tasks.title: Implement CLI Report command
tasks.description: Replace 'not yet implemented' with full report generation. Implement report command that produces JSON, JUnit XML, and Markdown output formats with all ParityReport fields including gate evaluation results.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness report --output json' produces valid JSON with all ParityReport fields
AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness report --output junit' produces valid JUnit XML format with test results
AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness report --output md' produces valid Markdown report with all sections
AddRegressionTest: ensure report generation includes gate evaluation result in output
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify report command handles missing data gracefully with proper error messages
RunTestSuite: execute report_schema_smoke_tests to validate all report formats
tasks.impl_notes: Implement ReportCommand in cli/src/commands/report.rs. Use serde_json for JSON serialization, quick-xml for JUnit XML, and pulldown-cmark for Markdown rendering. Gate evaluation should be included as a top-level field in all output formats.

tasks.title: Create API Contract
tasks.description: Define API contract YAML covering server lifecycle, /doc, auth, CORS, session/project interfaces, event subscription, message/command interface, file operations interface, and tool registration interface.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify contracts/api/api_contract.yaml exists and parses as valid YAML
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers server startup/shutdown lifecycle endpoints
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers /doc endpoint specification and response schema
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers authentication flow including token refresh
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers CORS headers configuration and allowed origins
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers session management endpoints (create, resume, terminate, list)
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers project management endpoints (create, list, delete)
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers message/command interface request/response schemas
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers file operations interface (read, write, delete)
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers tool registration interface and tool discovery
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers event subscription mechanism and payload types
tasks.impl_notes: Create contracts/api/api_contract.yaml with OpenAPI 3.0 style specification. Include all endpoints, request/response schemas, authentication schemes, and error types. Document subscription event types and payloads.

tasks.title: Expand API Tasks to 8-10
tasks.description: Create 6 new API tasks (SMOKE-API-005 through SMOKE-API-010) to reach 10 total API tasks covering session create/resume, project list, message send, event subscribe, and tool list operations.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-API-005 Session create via API creates new session and returns session_id
AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-API-006 Session resume via API resumes existing session with valid session_id
AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-API-007 Project list via API returns list of accessible projects
AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-API-008 Message send via API sends message and receives response
AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-API-009 Event subscribe via API establishes event subscription and receives events
AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-API-010 Tool list via API returns list of registered tools
AddRegressionTest: ensure all 10 API tasks run successfully in sequence
RunTestSuite: execute all API smoke tests to verify 100% pass rate
test_commands: cargo test SMOKE-API-005 SMOKE-API-006 SMOKE-API-007 SMOKE-API-008 SMOKE-API-009 SMOKE-API-010
tasks.impl_notes: Create 6 new integration tests in tests/api/. Each test should use the API client to make HTTP requests and verify responses. Follow existing API test patterns and naming conventions.

tasks.title: Create Recovery Tasks
tasks.description: Create 3 recovery tasks (SMOKE-RECOVERY-001 through SMOKE-RECOVERY-003) covering session reconnect, interrupted operation recovery, and server restart handling scenarios.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-RECOVERY-001 Session reconnect successfully reconnects to existing session after connection loss
AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-RECOVERY-002 Interrupted operation recovery resumes operation after interruption without data loss
AddIntegrationTest: verify SMOKE-RECOVERY-003 Server restart handling correctly handles server restart and maintains session state
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify recovery mechanisms handle repeated connection failures gracefully
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify recovery handles corrupted session state appropriately
RunTestSuite: execute all recovery smoke tests to verify resilience
tasks.impl_notes: Create 3 new integration tests in tests/recovery/. Implement connection loss simulation, interruption injection, and server restart scenarios. Verify session state preservation and data integrity after recovery.

tasks.title: Create Event Contract
tasks.description: Define event stream contract covering event types, payloads, subscription lifecycle including subscription creation, event filtering, acknowledgment, and unsubscription.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify contracts/events/event_contract.yaml exists and parses as valid YAML
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers all event types (session, project, message, system)
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers event payload schemas for each event type
AddIntegrationTest: verify contract covers subscription lifecycle (create, update, delete)
RunTestSuite: execute event contract validation tests
tasks.impl_notes: Create contracts/events/event_contract.yaml documenting all event types, their payloads, subscription management, and delivery guarantees. Follow CloudEvents specification where applicable.

tasks.title: Unify Report type naming
tasks.description: Rename types/report.rs::Report to SimpleReport to avoid confusion with ParityReport. Update all references throughout the codebase.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure types/report.rs compiles after renaming Report to SimpleReport
AddRegressionTest: ensure all references to Report type in cli/, api/, and core/ are updated
AddRegressionTest: ensure cargo build succeeds without naming conflicts
AddRegressionTest: ensure cargo test passes with renamed type
RunTestSuite: execute all tests to ensure no regressions from rename
tasks.impl_notes: Rename Report struct to SimpleReport in types/report.rs. Search and replace all usages in cli/, api/, contracts/. Ensure no orphan references or stale imports remain.

tasks.title: Externalize configuration
tasks.description: Move hardcoded thresholds (pass_rate, timeouts) to config files. Create config schema and loading mechanism.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure pass_rate threshold is read from config file instead of hardcoded
AddRegressionTest: ensure timeout values are read from config file instead of hardcoded
AddRegressionTest: ensure default config values are used when config file is missing
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify application handles malformed config file gracefully
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify application handles missing config file gracefully
RunTestSuite: execute all tests with externalized configuration
tasks.impl_notes: Create config/ directory with YAML config files. Implement ConfigLoader to read from ~/.opencode/config.yaml. Replace all hardcoded thresholds with config lookups. Maintain backward compatibility with defaults.

tasks.title: CLI help command displays usage
tasks.description: CLI help command displays usage information for all available commands
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness help' displays usage information
AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness <command> --help' shows command-specific help

tasks.title: CLI version command displays version
tasks.description: CLI version command displays version information
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness version' displays version string

tasks.title: CLI serve command starts server
tasks.description: CLI serve command starts the server in background mode
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness serve' starts server and accepts connections

tasks.title: CLI stats command shows stats
tasks.description: CLI stats command displays statistics about executed tests and operations
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness stats' displays statistics

tasks.title: CLI session command manages sessions
tasks.description: CLI session command creates, lists, switches, and terminates sessions
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness session create' creates new session
AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness session list' lists all sessions
AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness session switch' switches active session
AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness session terminate' terminates session

tasks.title: CLI export command exports data
tasks.description: CLI export command exports test results and session data
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness export --format json' exports valid JSON
AddIntegrationTest: verify 'harness export --format csv' exports valid CSV

tasks.title: API health endpoint returns status
tasks.description: API health endpoint returns server health status
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /health returns 200 with {"status": "ok"}

tasks.title: API status endpoint returns server status
tasks.description: API status endpoint returns detailed server status information
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /status returns server status with version and uptime

tasks.title: API version endpoint returns version info
tasks.description: API version endpoint returns version information
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /version returns version information

tasks.title: API metrics endpoint returns server metrics
tasks.description: API metrics endpoint returns server metrics in Prometheus format
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /metrics returns Prometheus-formatted metrics

tasks.title: Session create via API
tasks.description: API endpoint to create a new session with specified configuration
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify POST /sessions creates new session and returns session_id
AddIntegrationTest: verify POST /sessions with valid config returns 201 Created
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify POST /sessions with invalid config returns 400 Bad Request
tasks.impl_notes: Implement POST /sessions endpoint. Request body: {config: SessionConfig}. Response: {session_id: string, created_at: timestamp}.

tasks.title: Session resume via API
tasks.description: API endpoint to resume an existing session by session_id
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify POST /sessions/{id}/resume resumes existing session
AddIntegrationTest: verify POST /sessions/{id}/resume with valid session_id returns session state
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify POST /sessions/{id}/resume with expired session_id returns 404
tasks.impl_notes: Implement POST /sessions/{session_id}/resume endpoint. Returns current session state including workspace and history.

tasks.title: Project list via API
tasks.description: API endpoint to list all accessible projects
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /projects returns list of projects
AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /projects returns projects with correct metadata (id, name, created_at)
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify GET /projects with no projects returns empty array
tasks.impl_notes: Implement GET /projects endpoint. Returns array of Project objects with id, name, path, and created_at fields.

tasks.title: Message send via API
tasks.description: API endpoint to send a message to an active session
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify POST /sessions/{id}/messages sends message and returns response
AddIntegrationTest: verify POST /sessions/{id}/messages with valid content returns message response
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify POST /sessions/{id}/messages with empty content returns 400
tasks.impl_notes: Implement POST /sessions/{session_id}/messages endpoint. Request: {content: string, context?: object}. Response: {message_id, response}.

tasks.title: Event subscribe via API
tasks.description: API endpoint to subscribe to server-side events
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify POST /events/subscribe creates event subscription
AddIntegrationTest: verify POST /events/subscribe with event_types returns subscription_id
AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /events/{subscription_id} receives events
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify POST /events/subscribe with invalid event_types returns 400
tasks.impl_notes: Implement POST /events/subscribe and GET /events/{subscription_id} endpoints. Subscription: {event_types: string[]}. Event: {type, payload, timestamp}.

tasks.title: Tool list via API
tasks.description: API endpoint to list all registered tools
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /tools returns list of registered tools
AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /tools returns tools with correct metadata (name, description, schema)
AddIntegrationTest: verify GET /tools/{name} returns specific tool details
tasks.impl_notes: Implement GET /tools and GET /tools/{name} endpoints. Returns array of Tool objects with name, description, input_schema, and output_schema.

tasks.title: Build permission writes files
tasks.description: Build permission allows file system write operations
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify operations requiring BUILD permission can write files

tasks.title: Plan permission reads without writing
tasks.description: Plan permission allows read operations without file modifications
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify operations requiring PLAN permission can read files

tasks.title: Ask permission queries without changes
tasks.description: Ask permission allows queries without any file system changes
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify operations requiring ASK permission can query without changes

tasks.title: Permission denied for restricted operations
tasks.description: Restricted operations are denied when proper permission is not granted
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify operations without proper permission return permission denied error

tasks.title: Session create
tasks.description: Session can be created with specified configuration
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify session creation with valid config succeeds
AddIntegrationTest: verify session_id is returned and unique

tasks.title: Session switch
tasks.description: Active session can be switched to another existing session
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify switching from one session to another succeeds

tasks.title: Session terminate
tasks.description: Session can be terminated and cleaned up
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify session termination removes session and cleans up resources

tasks.title: Session persist across restarts
tasks.description: Session state persists across server restarts
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify session state is restored after server restart

tasks.title: Workspace create
tasks.description: Workspace can be created in specified directory
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify workspace creation in empty directory succeeds

tasks.title: Workspace file operations
tasks.description: Workspace supports file read, write, and delete operations
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify file read operation returns correct content
AddIntegrationTest: verify file write operation persists content
AddIntegrationTest: verify file delete operation removes file

tasks.title: Workspace git operations
tasks.description: Workspace supports git init, add, commit, and status operations
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify git init initializes repository
AddIntegrationTest: verify git add and commit work correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify git status shows correct state

tasks.title: Workspace cleanup on exit
tasks.description: Workspace is cleaned up properly when session exits
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify workspace cleanup removes temporary files on exit

tasks.title: Workspace config preservation
tasks.description: Workspace configuration is preserved across sessions
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify workspace config persists across session restart

tasks.title: Session reconnect
tasks.description: Session can be reconnected after temporary connection loss
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify session reconnects successfully after connection interruption
AddIntegrationTest: verify session state is preserved during reconnection
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify session handles prolonged disconnection gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: Implement session reconnection logic. Simulate connection loss for 5-30 seconds and verify automatic reconnection. Verify no data loss or corruption.

tasks.title: Interrupted operation recovery
tasks.description: Operations interrupted by connection loss can be recovered and completed
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify interrupted file write operation resumes correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify interrupted git operation can be completed after reconnection
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify partial operation state is handled correctly on recovery
tasks.impl_notes: Implement operation recovery mechanism. Track operation state and allow resumption. Verify idempotency of recovery operations.

tasks.title: Server restart handling
tasks.description: Client handles server restart and reconnects automatically
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify client reconnects automatically after server restart
AddIntegrationTest: verify session state is preserved across server restart
AddIntegrationTest: verify pending operations are completed after restart
tasks.impl_notes: Implement server restart detection and automatic reconnection. Verify session state persistence using persistent storage. Test with graceful and unclean shutdown scenarios.
